glob_info: Only matched files are retained in the folder tree; unmatched structures are hidden.
tree_no_files: No files found in this repository.
tree_awaiting_input: Enter a repository URL above to load the directory tree.
guide_no_selection_desc: Click check boxes in the left repository tree to batch download files, or click any file/folder to view individual download script.
guide_no_selection_info: Supports branch switching, PAT, and dual-mode downloads!
toast_batch_selected_desc: Added all {{count}} matching files to download script.
toast_clear_desc: Removed all files from download script.
toast_sh_downloaded_desc: {{filename}} has been saved to your downloads.
toast_mode_switched_desc: Switched to Git Sparse mode successfully.
err_empty_url: Please enter a GitHub repository URL
err_invalid_url: Invalid GitHub repository. Please enter either 'owner/repo' or 'https://github.com/owner/repo'
toast_error_token_hint: Click the key icon in the top-right to add your GitHub Personal Access Token.
